reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark evidenceStatus=satisfied only for the Cautilus Agent source-launcher preference claim covered by skill text, packaged sync, focused tests, and local resolution output.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names deterministic skill guidance and local binary resolution behavior in the Cautilus product checkout.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by synchronized source and packaged Cautilus Agent skill text, the skill-disclosure and distribution gates, and a local resolution snippet that chooses ./bin/cautilus when it is executable and then runs version 0.14.2 through that launcher.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep product-repo source-launcher guidance separate from consumer-repo PATH guidance.
